objective: Make apply, status, evidence, and closeout states truthful after candidate application, especially for unverified applies and stale historical acceptance.

status_freshness.stale_reason: accepted_but_stale: fixture has an accepted historical state, but current source, render, critique, or export evidence is stale. Re-run compile/critique/export and refresh acceptance before closeout.
status_freshness.behavior: Historical acceptance remains visible, but stale current evidence prevents ready status and closeout.

implemented_behaviors: candidate_apply records post_apply=False outcomes as applied_unverified instead of applied.
candidate_apply attaches required follow-up commands for unverified applies.
applied_unverified is terminal in apply replay prevention and candidate acceptance readiness.
evidence_index propagates candidate.required_commands from apply results.
status_readiness_policy exposes acceptance_freshness_state with accepted_but_stale for stale historical acceptance.
closeout_readiness blocks applied_unverified and stale accepted current evidence with deterministic reasons.
fig_closeout exposes acceptance freshness and blocks stale tracked-golden acceptance without contradictory manual approval messaging.
CLI and MCP contract fixtures provide fresh source hashes and declared panel evidence instead of weakening candidate evidence gates.

tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_candidate_apply.py tests/test_candidate_acceptance.py tests/test_evidence_index.py tests/test_closeout_readiness.py tests/test_status_readiness_policy.py tests/test_fig_closeout.py tests/test_status.py -q
tests.red_result_before_implementation: failed because no-verification apply reported applied, stale historical acceptance could remain closeout-ready, and required follow-up commands were not propagated through evidence/status surfaces

tests.command: uv run ruff check scripts/candidates/candidate_apply.py scripts/candidates/candidate_acceptance.py scripts/evidence_index.py scripts/closeout_readiness.py scripts/status_readiness_policy.py scripts/status.py scripts/fig_closeout.py tests/test_candidate_apply.py tests/test_candidate_acceptance.py tests/test_evidence_index.py tests/test_closeout_readiness.py tests/test_status_readiness_policy.py tests/test_status.py tests/test_fig_closeout.py tests/test_candidate_cli_contract.py tests/test_mcp_facade.py

uv run python -m py_compile scripts/candidates/candidate_apply.py scripts/candidates/candidate_acceptance.py scripts/evidence_index.py scripts/closeout_readiness.py scripts/status_readiness_policy.py scripts/status.py scripts/fig_closeout.py

adversarial_verification.summary: No findings. Reviewer verified truthful apply states, terminal replay blocking, failed-verification status preservation, required command propagation, closeout blockers for applied_unverified and accepted_but_stale, and non-weakening CLI/MCP fixture updates.

tooling_notes.summary: Previously unavailable in this environment: uv run basedpyright failed to spawn basedpyright.
rg --files -g 'check-no-excuse-rules.py' returned no matching script in this repository.
